name: 10q11_21_RET_SD
description: 10q11.21 segmental duplication block flanking the RET proto-oncogene and CCDC6. Pericentromeric SDs mediate the recurrent RET/CCDC6 (PTC1) and RET/NCOA4 (PTC3) intrachromosomal inversions / fusions that drive papillary thyroid carcinoma.

architecture.internal_structure: Pericentromeric SD-rich; Alu-mediated inversions between RET and CCDC6/NCOA4 generate radiation-induced and somatic fusion oncogenes.
